dishes.name: Ceviche de Camaron
dishes.raw_description: Indulge in our refreshing Ceviche de Camarón, a vibrant dish that showcases the essence of coastal cuisine. Succulent shrimp are delicately marinated in zesty lime juice, infusing them with a bright and tangy flavor. Tossed with thinly sliced red onions, ripe tomatoes, and creamy avocado, this dish is a delightful medley of textures and tastes. Served cold, our ceviche is garnished with fresh cilantro and a hint of jalapeño for a subtle kick. Perfect as an appetizer or a light meal, this ceviche is sure to transport your taste buds to the shores of Mexico!
dishes.reasoning: Contains shrimp (seafood). | evidence: “Succulent shrimp”
